notes: Also: das All (same meaning, more poetic). Usually without article: 'im Weltraum', 'in den Weltraum'.

sentences.german: Die Astronauten fliegen in den Weltraum.
sentences.english: The astronauts are flying into outer space.

sentences.german: Im Weltraum gibt es unzählige Sterne und Galaxien.
sentences.english: In outer space there are countless stars and galaxies.

cloze_sentences.english: The astronauts are flying into outer space.
